'''竏嗚-zh-ch''' ('''kajazhach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cockneyfy|cockneyfy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cockneyfy|cockneyfy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-zh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhach|thijazhach]] || [[word:jijazhach|jijazhach]] || [[word:shijazhach|shijazhach]] || [[word:kijazhach|kijazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhach|thuthujazhach]] || [[word:jujujazhach|jujujazhach]] || [[word:shushujazhach|shushujazhach]] || [[word:kukujazhach|kukujazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazhach|thujazhach]] || [[word:jujazhach|jujazhach]] || [[word:shujazhach|shujazhach]] || [[word:kujazhach|kujazhach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazhach|thujazhach]] || [[word:jujazhach|jujazhach]] || [[word:shujazhach|shujazhach]] || [[word:kujazhach|kujazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejazhach|thejazhach]] || [[word:jejazhach|jejazhach]] || [[word:shejazhach|shejazhach]] || [[word:kejazhach|kejazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojazhach|thothojazhach]] || [[word:jojojazhach|jojojazhach]] || [[word:shoshojazhach|shoshojazhach]] || [[word:kokojazhach|kokojazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazhach|thojazhach]] || [[word:jojazhach|jojazhach]] || [[word:shojazhach|shojazhach]] || [[word:kojazhach|kojazhach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhach|thojazhach]] || [[word:jojazhach|jojazhach]] || [[word:shojazhach|shojazhach]] || [[word:kojazhach|kojazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjazhach|thﾃｦjazhach]] || [[word:jﾃｦjazhach|jﾃｦjazhach]] || [[word:shﾃｦjazhach|shﾃｦjazhach]] || [[word:kﾃｦjazhach|kﾃｦjazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhach|thathajazhach]] || [[word:jajajazhach|jajajazhach]] || [[word:shashajazhach|shashajazhach]] || [[word:kakajazhach|kakajazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhach|thajazhach]] || [[word:jajazhach|jajazhach]] || [[word:shajazhach|shajazhach]] || [[word:kajazhach|kajazhach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazhach|thajazhach]] || [[word:jajazhach|jajazhach]] || [[word:shajazhach|shajazhach]] || [[word:kajazhach|kajazhach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajazhach|shajazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazhach|goshajazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazhach|gokishajazhach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazhachnﾃｼ|shajazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhachnknﾃｼ|goshajazhachnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhachnﾃｼ|gokishajazhachnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazhachshﾃｫ|shajazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkshﾃｫ|goshajazhachnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazhachshﾃｫ|gokishajazhachshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhachro|shajazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkro|goshajazhachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhachro|gokishajazhachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhachmu|shajazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkmu|goshajazhachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhachmu|gokishajazhachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazhachsher|shajazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazhachnksher|goshajazhachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazhachsher|gokishajazhachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazhachng|shajazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkng|goshajazhachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazhachng|gokishajazhachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazhachya|shajazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkya|goshajazhachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazhachya|gokishajazhachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazhachyam|shajazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkyam|goshajazhachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazhachyam|gokishajazhachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shajazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshajazhachnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishajazhachnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhachnﾃｼro|shajazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhachnknﾃｼro|goshajazhachnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhachnﾃｼro|gokishajazhachnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhachnﾃｼmu|shajazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhachnknﾃｼmu|goshajazhachnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhachnﾃｼmu|gokishajazhachnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shajazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshajazhachnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishajazhachshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhachshﾃｫro|shajazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkshﾃｫro|goshajazhachnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhachshﾃｫro|gokishajazhachshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhachshﾃｫmu|shajazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkshﾃｫmu|goshajazhachnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhachshﾃｫmu|gokishajazhachshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhachronﾃｼ|shajazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkronﾃｼ|goshajazhachnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhachronﾃｼ|gokishajazhachronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhachroshﾃｫ|shajazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkroshﾃｫ|goshajazhachnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhachroshﾃｫ|gokishajazhachroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhachromu|shajazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkromu|goshajazhachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhachromu|gokishajazhachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhachmunﾃｼ|shajazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkmunﾃｼ|goshajazhachnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhachmunﾃｼ|gokishajazhachmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhachmushﾃｫ|shajazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkmushﾃｫ|goshajazhachnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhachmushﾃｫ|gokishajazhachmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhachmuro|shajazhachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhachnkmuro|goshajazhachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhachmuro|gokishajazhachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
